title: Disaster Related Drinking Water - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Disaster Services > Disaster Related Drinking Water 6 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF COOLING CENTERS BENTON COUNTY BENTON COUNTY HEALTH DEPARTMENT COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on cooling centers during an extreme heat event. May offer additional cooling resources. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met. (541) 766-6835 Visit Website More Details COOLING CENTERS MULTNOMAH COUNTY MULTNOMAH COUNTY HELP FOR WHEN IT'S HOT WEBSITE COOLING SHELTER LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on places to keep cool, extended library hours for weather events and, when activated for extreme heat, information on hours and locations of cooling centers in the county. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met. May offer additional cooling resources, including public drinking fountains, splash pads, and misting stations. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Cooling centers operate during heat advisories. Locations are open either throughout the summer season or when temperature thresholds are met.
